ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country (e.g., CN for China) */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL to the country's flag image */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country in USD */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "olympic_games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Olympic Games */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the Olympic Games (e.g., Summer Olympics 2020) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the Olympic Games were held */,
  "host_country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the host country */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the Olympic Games */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the Olympic Games */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of Olympic Games (e.g., Summer, Winter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_olympic_games_host_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medal_counts" (
  "medal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medal count entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Olympic Games */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "gold" INTEGER /* Number of gold medals won */,
  "silver" INTEGER /* Number of silver medals won */,
  "bronze" INTEGER /* Number of bronze medals won */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total number of medals won */,
  "rank_by_total" INTEGER /* Rank by total medals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medal_counts_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medal_counts_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES olympic_games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., 100m Sprint) */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES event_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport (e.g., Athletics) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "athlete_name" TEXT /* Name of the athlete */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete's country */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete in kilograms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participations" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Olympic Games */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank achieved by the athlete in the event */,
  "medal_type" TEXT /* Type of medal won (e.g., Gold, Silver, Bronze) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participations_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES olympic_games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participations_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the event category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Olympic Games */,
  "result_time" REAL /* Result time (for time-based events) */,
  "result_score" REAL /* Result score (for score-based events) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES olympic_games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_medal_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medal distribution entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Olympic Games */,
  "gold" INTEGER /* Total number of gold medals awarded */,
  "silver" INTEGER /* Total number of silver medals awarded */,
  "bronze" INTEGER /* Total number of bronze medals awarded */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total number of medals awarded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_medal_distribution_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES olympic_games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_participations" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country participation */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Olympic Games */,
  "athlete_count" INTEGER /* Number of athletes participating from the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_participations_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES olympic_games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_participations_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
